purpose: Document the required workflow inputs for a future constrained pick/place motion template.

cellContext.robot: Review actual robot model before generation

motionPlan.speedPolicy: Use reviewed low-speed values in first generation-ready spec.
motionPlan.terminationPolicy: Use FINE/CNT only after path review.
motionPlan.approachRetract: Approach and retract points must be explicit and reviewed.
motionPlan.clearancePolicy: Clearance from fixtures, tooling, and operator space must be reviewed.
motionPlan.recoveryPlan: Recovery must be described before generation.

evidence.roboguidePlan: Create RoboGuide evidence packet before generation-ready status.
evidence.t1Plan: Create pendant/T1 verification checklist before upload.
evidence.snapshotPlan: Capture before/after status snapshots for relevant registers, IO, and operator checks.
acceptanceCriteria: T1 verification plan has named stop/recovery points.

generation.notes: Motion generation is blocked until all reviewed workflow gates pass.
